prompts.name: Collectible Figure
prompts.text:
Transformation & Theme: The person from the reference image is transformed into a premium collectible character figure (1/6 scale), rendered with smooth PVC and hand-painted resin textures, mimicking high-quality merchandise or an art toy.

Identity Preservation: The face retains absolute identity fidelity but is stylized as a realistic toy sculpture with painted skin tones and sculpted hair details.

Wardrobe & Props (Art Directed): Replace original clothing materials. The clothing is rendered to look like sculpted plastic with shaded folds and matte finishes. The figure stands firmly on a round plastic display base.

Scene & Context: The setting is a 3D artist's indoor workspace. Immediately behind the figure stands its packaging box featuring the character's printed image. Further in the background, a computer monitor displays the Blender 3D software interface, showing the wireframe mesh process of the model.

Lighting & Tech: Macro photography aesthetic. Soft, focused desk lighting highlights the plastic sheen of the figure. Shallow depth of field blurs the monitor slightly to keep focus on the toy. Ultra-sharp details, 8k resolution, tilt-shift effect.

prompts.name: 3D Toon Avatar
prompts.text:
Transformation & Style: The person from the reference image is completely transformed into a high-end 3D Pixar-style caricature. The body must be rendered in a full-body shot with exaggerated proportions: a slightly larger head and a smaller, stylized body to create a playful, charming aesthetic.

Identity Preservation: The face must remain recognizable and retain the subject's identity, but adapted to the smooth, subsurface-scattering skin texture of a 3D animated movie. Preserve eye color and hair style.

Wardrobe (Art Directed): Do not use the original clothes. Dress the subject in vibrant, stylized modern streetwear: think oversized hoodies, colorful layered shirts, and chunky cartoon sneakers. The clothing should look comfortable, fun, and high-fashion cartoon style.

Scene: Replace the original background completely. Place the character in a pristine, bright studio cyclorama with soft, colorful gradient lighting (purple and teal rim lights).

Tech Specs: 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, octane render, vivid colors, expressive pose looking at the camera.

prompts.name: Toy Squad
prompts.text:
Transformation & Theme: The person from the reference image is transported into a vibrant "Living Toys" animated movie world. The aesthetic is colorful, nostalgic, and full of joy.

Identity Preservation: The subject's face must remain fully recognizable with absolute fidelity. The subject is taking a cheerful selfie (arm extended towards the camera).

Wardrobe (Art Directed): Replace original clothing completely. Dress the subject in a casual, colorful outfit that fits the animated aesthetic (e.g., a simple bright t-shirt or flannel).

Scene & Characters: The scene takes place in a bedroom with iconic blue sky and cloud wallpaper. The subject is surrounded by living toy characters posing playfully for the selfie: a vintage cowboy doll, a futuristic space ranger action figure, a cowgirl doll, and a green dinosaur toy.

Lighting & Tech: Warm natural daylight streaming through the window. 3D animation style rendering mixed with photorealism (Pixar-esque style). Wide-angle lens effect (selfie perspective), vivid colors, high energy.

prompts.name: Night Market Caricature
prompts.text:
Identity Preservation & Gaze: CRITICAL: The subject's facial features, bone structure, and hair color/texture must remain 100% identical to the reference image. The subject is sitting with confidence and maintains intense, natural eye contact with the camera, flashing a beautiful smile.

Composition & Subject: A full-body ultra-realistic photograph. In the immediate foreground, the back and shoulders of an artist are visible as they lean forward, drawing. The main subject sits on a black folding chair at a traditional Mexican night market.

The Caricature: On an easel beside the woman, a vibrant 2D caricature is clearly visible. It features exaggerated facial features and body proportions, strictly emulating the Spümcø / John Kricfalusi animation style.

Wardrobe & Environment: The subject wears a tight cropped t-shirt, relaxed dark jeans, and casual sneakers. The background is a bustling night market filled with vibrant neon signs, traditional lanterns, and food stalls. Intense neon colors from the signs reflect off the subject's skin and clothing.

Technical Details: 8K resolution, cinematic realism. Shot with a 70mm lens at f/2.8, ISO 200. High dynamic range (HDR) with rich textures in fabric and skin. Eye-level shot with a shallow depth of field, keeping the subject and the caricature sharp while the market background has a soft, colorful bokeh.

prompts.name: Fiery Techwear Hero
prompts.text:
Identity Preservation: CRITICAL: The subject's facial features must remain 100% identical to the reference image. The subject maintains intense, piercing eye contact visible through the futuristic reflective sunglasses.

Composition & Pose: A powerful low-angle hero portrait. The subject stands in an imposing and dominant stance, looking slightly down toward the camera.

Wardrobe & Styling: The subject wears a structured, dark techwear high-collar jacket with technical textures and a modern, sleek silhouette.

Lighting & Background: A dramatic fiery orange back-halo glows directly behind the subject's head, creating a sharp rim-light effect. The background is a smooth cinematic gradient transitioning from deep red to vibrant orange.

Technical Details: Ultra-realistic 8K resolution. High-contrast shadows and premium poster-style lighting. Captured as if shot with a Sony A7R IV and an 85mm f/1.4 lens, ensuring a very shallow depth of field with a sharp focus on the face and reflections in the sunglasses.

prompts.name: Black Ops Armor
prompts.text:
Transformation & Theme: The person from the reference image is transformed into a futuristic, ultra-armored High-Tech Special Ops Warrior. The aesthetic is a hybrid of "deadly ninja" and "heavy soldier"—dark, menacing, and elite.

Identity Preservation: The subject's face must remain fully recognizable with absolute fidelity to the reference. The expression is intense, focused, and ready for combat.

Wardrobe (Art Directed): Replace original clothing completely. Dress the subject in a sleek, matte black armored suit with intricate chest plating and a sculpted abdominal design that mimics musculature and high-tech biomechanical patterns. Shoulders are heavily armored with angular plating; forearms feature gauntlets with rows of tactical metal spikes. Twin katanas are mounted in scabbards on the back, crossing over one another.

Props & Action: The subject stands powerfully holding a heavy, sophisticated super-tech weapon with both hands. The kit includes heavy-duty tactical belts, pouches, and ammo cases.

Scene & Atmosphere: Posed against a dark, gritty, metallic urban wall with industrial panels and corrugated steel textures. The atmosphere feels like a secret vigilante operation.

Lighting & Tech: Dramatic cinematic lighting—cool-toned with soft highlights on the armor’s edges to emphasize shape and structure. Ultra-realistic, 8K detail, dark superhero style, editorial-grade photography.

prompts.name: Red Hood
prompts.text: A striking half-body portrait of the person from the reference image with a bold, enigmatic presence in a powerful red, black and grayscale palette. They look upward and slightly to their left with a confident, intense expression. They wear modern rectangular sunglasses with dark frames and highly reflective bright red lenses that stand out against the grayscale face. They are wrapped in a large, rich red hooded garment or cloak draping over the shoulders and framing the face—soft texture like velvet or thick fabric; red drawstrings visible at the chest. Beneath it, a dark grayscale shirt with intricate damask or paisley pattern. The image is dominated by deep red tones in the background and outer garment, creating drama, passion and power. Face and patterned shirt in grayscale so the red elements pop. Background: gradient from deep black to bright intense red. Overall: graphic, modern, high-contrast; intense, mysterious, stylish. Half-body from chest up, sharp focus on face and upper body. Facial identity from the reference image must be preserved exactly.

Hasselblad medium format look, 50mm lens at f/1.4, ultra-sharp focus on the face and pen with creamy depth of field. 8K resolution, photorealistic, rich jewel tones.

prompts.name: The Dark Knight's Garage
